scope_override.approved_by: PM (dispatch orchestrator, review round on PR #1182)
scope_override.reason: Two corrections landed after lane-start's original declaration: (1) lane-start's --files flag captured only the last value passed (a pre-existing CLI arg-parsing bug in scripts/ops/shared.ts parseArgs), so the manifest committed by lane-start declared only .github/workflows/file-scope-lock-check.yml and silently dropped scripts/ci/file-scope-guard.ts and scripts/ci/file-scope-guard.test.ts; corrected before Codex began implementation (commit 06c1160f / pushed as b4c86d8e). (2) The PM review round on PR #1182 required registering scripts/ci/file-scope-guard.test.ts in package.json's test:ops list (a Codex P2 finding), a one-line addition to package.json that needs to be in-scope too. Both corrections match what this lane was actually dispatched to build; neither introduces unrelated production code.
